description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
What's Changed
- Add checkpointing UI by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/711
- Add support for downloading audio datasets from HF by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/709
- Add custom url for tensorboard modal by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/685
- Add/audio tts by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/710
- Change audio output path by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/715
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.20.7...v0.21.1
